tagline: Meet neighbors through tiny shared wins.

designSystem.style: Dark-first neighborhood social app with warm coral accents, card-based feed layout, reciprocity gamification, and micro-interaction button states. Uses teal for offers/trust, amber for urgency/activity, and purple for trades. Pill tags, rounded cards, and a floating post button define the visual language.

screens: Feed — NeedCard stream with type filters (All/Need/Offer/Trade), neighbor activity strip, like and help actions
Match — Micro-Match compatibility cards with percentage scores, mutual help badges, and recent connections row
Post — 3-step wizard (Type → Category → Details) with animated progress bar and time window picker
Circles — Community circle cards with live member counts, discover section, and quick join CTA
Profile — Reciprocity score dashboard, trust badges, exchange history, settings list, and theme toggle
